goal: Finish the desktop-view pass: deck-detail (78-card browse) and shop/gacha (Meow Market) were still centred narrow columns (~480px / ~560px) on desktop.
done: Appended two additive @media(min-width:1024px) blocks to css/decks.css (the deck-family stylesheet, loaded by decks/deck-detail/shop). DECK-DETAIL (body[data-page='deck-detail']): .dd-content max-width 480->1080px, header padding/art/name enlarged, .dd-grid 3 -> 6 cols. SHOP (body[data-page='shop']): .shop-shell max-width 560->1040px, .shop-grid 2 -> 4 cols (base .dd-*/.shop-* rules live in css/styles.css; these override at desktop). EN+TH inherit (shared CSS keyed off body[data-page]). meow-coin/weekly-shop/asset-resolver JS untouched.
verified: Headless render at 1440px: deck-detail now a wide header + 6-col card grid; shop now fills 1040px with the gacha 'Summon a new deck' band + 4-card Weekly Spotlight + 4-col deck grid, footer centred. Mobile <1024px unchanged (rules inside the media query).
